reviews.comment:
Los chicos de playa..muy atentos y amables.

Sábado tarde noche sin nafta super.
La app YPF sólo para pago de combustibles.

Para pagar liquido limpiaparabrisas y agua destilada, tuve que hacerlo con otro medio de pago.

Cuando menos extraño.

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the beach were very attentive and friendly.

Saturday afternoon/evening, no premium gasoline.
The YPF app is only for fuel payments.

To pay for windshield washer fluid and distilled water, I had to use another payment method.

At the very least, I miss it.

reviewReply.comment: Agradecemos su calificación y si la App es solo para Combustibles pagos en Full y BOXES ,

reviews.comment:
Buenos dias, el dia de hoy fui a cargar en moto y rebalso el tanque, toda la moto mojada en nafta, aprox 1L el excedente.
Nunca pidio una disculpa el playero, ni se hizo cargo de la limpieza del vehiculo, paso un trapo por una minima zona y luego procedio al cobro.

(Translated by Google)
Good morning, today I went to fill up my motorcycle at the gas station and the tank overflowed, soaking the entire bike with gasoline, approximately 1 liter of excess. The attendant never apologized, nor did he take responsibility for cleaning the vehicle; he just wiped a small area with a cloth and then proceeded to charge me.

reviewReply.comment: Entiendo su disgusto, revisaremos cámaras para ver quién lo atendió ya que no lo menciona , y procederemos sobre ello ,gracias  por informarlo

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvczV6Qk5BEAE
